end,function(Z,i)local T=A(i)local z=function(z,G,b,n,J)return V(Z,{z;G,b;n,J},i,T)end return z end,function(Z,i)local T=A(i)local z=function(z,G,b,n,J,k)return V(Z,{z,G,b;n;J,k},i,T)end return z
